fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the payment service type.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the payment service.

fields.name: Enabled
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the payment service is enabled.

fields.name: Always Include on Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the payment service is always available in the Payment Service field on outgoing sales documents.

fields.name: Terms of Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies a link to the Terms of Service page for the payment service.

fields.name: Available
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the icon and link to the payment service will be inserted on the outgoing sales document.
